title: Yaguwr #3017
definition:
Jagur = "he sojourns"

 1) a town of Judah, one of those farthest to the south, on the
    frontier of Edom
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jagur = "he sojourns"

 1) a town of Judah, one of those farthest to the south, on the
    frontier of Edom

    NASB:  a city in S. Judah
